resources.string: Domain allow mode is on - only listed sites stay allowed; all other web traffic is treated as out of focus.
No domains yet. Type a host (e.g. example.com) and tap + to add it.
Detects restricted apps and browser URLs during focus sessions.

Tyme Boxed uses the Accessibility Service to detect when you open a restricted app during a focus session and redirects you to the home screen to keep your session active. It also reads browser URL bars to enforce website blocking rules you set. Tyme Boxed does not collect, store, or share any personal data through this service. All processing happens on-device in real time. You can turn this off any time in Settings > Accessibility.
Tyme Boxed needs Accessibility access for app and website blocking during focus sessions.
• Detects when you open a restricted app during a focus session and redirects you to the home screen\n • Reads browser URL bars to enforce website blocking rules you set

Tyme Boxed does not collect, store, or share any personal data through the Accessibility Service. All processing happens on-device in real time. You can disable this any time in Settings > Accessibility.
Detects restricted apps during focus sessions and returns you home. Reads browser URLs for site blocking. On-device only — nothing is collected or shared.

Adds uninstall friction so you can\'t casually remove Tyme Boxed during a Strict-mode focus session. We never erase data, change your screen lock, or alter device security. You can turn this off any time from Settings > Security > Device admin apps.
Ongoing notification shown while a focus session is running.
Focus session paused. Tap to open Tyme Boxed.
Select how long you want %1$s to last.
Nudge to start a focus session again after one ends (when you enable Reminder on a profile)
Get back to productivity by enabling %1$s
Tyme Boxed is blocking this section: %1$s. You can change this in Settings → In-app blocking.
Block Shorts, Reels, Explore, and more inside apps.
Block specific features inside apps you still want to use - like Reels in Instagram or Shorts in YouTube.
When on, your choices below (e.g. Shorts or Reels) apply anytime — not only during a focus session.
Heads up - these blocks rely on detecting what\'s on screen, so they may break when apps update their layout.
Manage permissions and fix blocking issues.
Stops you from uninstalling Tyme Boxed mid-session. Requires Admin access.
Locked while a focus session is running. End the session to change this.
Strict mode stops you from uninstalling Tyme Boxed during a session - so future-you can’t bail.
Needs Device Admin access, which you can turn off anytime.
Strict mode needs Device Admin to prevent uninstall during a session. You can turn it off anytime.
You committed to not uninstalling Tyme Boxed during sessions. Turning this off lets you bail anytime.
Tap the glass to reveal the emergency unblock button. Use only when absolutely necessary.
Use only when absolutely necessary. Each emergency unblock ends your focus session without scanning your device.

plurals.name: emergency_glass_taps_remaining
plurals.item: %d more tap to break the glass
%d more taps to break the glass

resources.string: You have a limited number of emergency unblocks.
This will reduce your remaining count by 1.
Couldn’t read this tag. Try again.
Unregistered device detected. Please switch to a Tyme Box device.
Couldn’t verify this tag. Check your connection and try again.
Profile Name - e.g. Work, Family Time, Gym
When on, only the domains you pick stay accessible. Everything else gets blocked.
Shows session progress on your lock screen.
Pings you to start this profile again after it ends.
